title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: The Way of Illumination
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: The Sufi understands that although God is the source of all knowledge, inspiration, and guidance, yet man is the medium through which God chooses to impart His knowledge to the world. He imparts it through one who is a man in the eyes of the world, but God in his consciousness. It is the mature soul
